response: Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have both been members of a girl group. Tionne Watkins was a member of the American girl group TLC, which was formed in 1990 and included her, Lisa "Left Eye" Lopes, and Rozonda "Chilli" Thomas. Park So-yeon was a member of the South Korean girl group T-ara, which she led as the main vocalist. Both groups achieved significant success in their respective industries.
